title: Yihao Tan
text: I am is a Ph.D. candidate in Biostatistics at the State University of New York at Buffalo, with an expected graduation in December 2026. My research focuses on Bayesian Analysis, Empirical Bayes, Non-parametric Statistics, Clustering, Pharmacovigilance.
